name: @aily-project/board-xueersi_esp32
description: Xueersi XiaoMiao ESP32 handheld board with SPI TFT display, MicroSD card, six buttons, passive buzzer, light and temperature ADC sensors, I2C, UART0, and four GPIO expansion ports.
description_en: Xueersi XiaoMiao ESP32 handheld board with SPI TFT display, MicroSD card, six buttons, passive buzzer, light and temperature ADC sensors, I2C, UART0, and four GPIO expansion ports.
description_zh_cn: 学而思 ESP32 小喵掌机开发板，集成 SPI TFT 显示屏、MicroSD 卡、6 个按键、无源蜂鸣器、光照和温度 ADC 传感器、I2C、UART0 以及 4 个 GPIO 扩展口。
description_zh_hk: 學而思 ESP32 小喵掌機開發板，整合 SPI TFT 顯示屏、MicroSD 卡、6 個按鍵、無源蜂鳴器、光照和溫度 ADC 感測器、I2C、UART0 以及 4 個 GPIO 擴展口。
author: kittenbot
